items.title: The ‘Growler’ Signal-Jamming Jet That Helped Capture Nicolás Maduro
items.description: The U.S. used the jet for jamming and spoofing Venezuela’s air defense. It is a key tool in the military’s renewed focus on electronic warfare.

items.title: Aviation PLC: Options Abound In An Asymmetrically Priced Aircraft Leasing Business
items.description: Avation PLC maintains strong value within the consolidated aircraft leasing market despite current price gaps. Review this report to evaluate your portfolio.

items.title: Why Defense Stocks & ETFs Can Continue to Soar
items.description: Rising geopolitical risks are fueling a rally in defense and aerospace stocks.

items.title: LHX to Sell Majority Stake in Space Propulsion Business for $845M
items.description: L3Harris agrees to sell a majority stake in its Space Propulsion and Power Systems unit to AE Industrial for $845M, retaining 40% ownership.
